# Kunnskapsdepartementet

*15 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om barnehager (barnehageloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) | Barnehageloven – bhl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-17-64) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-17-64.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnehageloven (styring og finansiering av barnehagesektoren)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) | Endringslov til barnehageloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-100) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-100.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i opplæringslova (rett til 12 timer gratis skolefritidsordning ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-02-13-6.md) | Endringslov til opplæringslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2026-02-13-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-02-13-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2026-02-13-6.md) |
| [Lov om folkehøgskoler (folkehøgskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) | Folkehøgskoleloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-99) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-99.md) |
| [Lov om godkjenning av yrkeskvalifikasjoner (yrkeskvalifikasjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) | Yrkeskvalifikasjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-69) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-69.md) |
| [Lov om grunnskoleopplæringa og den vidaregåande opplæringa (opplæringslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) | Opplæringslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-09-30) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-09-30.md) |
| [Lov om høyere yrkesfaglig utdanning (fagskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) | Fagskoleloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2018-06-08-28) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) · [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2018/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2018-06-08-28.md) |
| [Lov om konsortium for europeisk forskingsinfrastruktur (ERIC-lova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) | ERIC-lova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-12-11-99) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-12-11-99.md) |
| [Lov om kristendomsundervisning ved vidaregåande skole, høgskole og universitet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) | Kristendomslærelov for vidaregåande skoler m.v. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1971-12-17-106) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1971-12-17-106.md) |
| [Lov om organisering av forskningsetisk arbeid (forskningsetikkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) | Forskningsetikkloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-04-28-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-04-28-23.md) |
| [Lov om private skolar med rett til statstilskot (privatskolelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) | Privatskolelova – prskol | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-07-04-84) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-07-04-84.md) |
| [Lov om studentsamskipnader (studentsamskipnadsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) | Studentsamskipnadsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2007-12-14-116) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2007/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2007-12-14-116.md) |
| [Lov om universiteter og høyskoler (universitets- og høyskoleloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) | Universitets- og høyskoleloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-03-08-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-03-08-9.md) |
| [Lov om utdanningsstøtte (utdanningsstøtteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) | Utdanningsstøtteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-03-37) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-03-37.md) |
| [Lov om voksenopplæring (voksenopplæringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) | Voksenopplæringsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-19-95) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-19-95.md) |
